title: Locator Bar (< 1.21.6)
description: Replicates the 1.21.6 Locator Bar feature for Paper 1.16.5–1.21.5. Displays nearby players on your Action Bar with distance-based icons and directional tracking.
body:
Brings the **1.21.6 Locator Bar** feature to Paper 1.16.5–1.21.5. Shows nearby players on your Action Bar with real-time directional tracking. No client-side mods required. ## How it works A bar appears above your hotbar showing the position of nearby players. Icons change based on distance: - **⬤** — Close (0–179 blocks) - **■** — Medium (179–230 blocks) - **●** — Far (230–281 blocks) - **•** — Very far (281+ blocks) Vertical arrows (**ꜛ ꜜ**) indicate when a player is above or below you. Each player is assigned a unique color for easy identification, which also appears in the tab list. ## Hiding from the bar Players are hidden from the Locator Bar when: - Sneaking - Under Invisibility effect - Wearing a mob head or carved pumpkin
Commands
- `/locatorbar` — Toggle the bar on/off - `/locatorbar on` — Enable - `/locatorbar off` — Disable - `/locatorbar reload` — Reload config
Configuration
All settings are customizable in `config.yml`: - `update-interval` — Refresh rate in ticks (default: 1) - `fov-degrees` — Field of view (default: 120°) - `bar-width` — Width of the bar in characters (default: 51) - `max-range` — Maximum tracking distance (0 = unlimited) - `distance-thresholds` — Customize icon distance breakpoints - `very-far-icon` — Custom icon for max distance - `show-vertical-arrows` — Toggle vertical arrows - `vertical-threshold` — Height difference to show arrows (default: 10) - `color-tab-names` — Color player names in tab list (default: true) - `hide-sneaking`, `hide-invisible`, `hide-masked` — Toggle hiding conditions
